name: Statsig
description: Feature flags and experimentation platform. Monitor feature gates and experiments.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Statsig at https://console.statsig.com
2. Go to Project Settings → API Keys
3. Create or copy a Console API Key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: Console API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Project Settings → API Keys → Console API Key on console.statsig.com

checks.name: Statsig App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Statsig Console API is accessible.
